summary: Clean, punchy soundboard capture of an above‑average 1987 show with standout Candyman, When I Paint My Masterpiece, Maggie’s Farm > Cumberland and a potent Stella Blue.
review: The recording is a pristine GMB soundboard source – clean, punchy and the richest version available. Musically the concert delivers an above‑average second set highlighted by a steady‑tempo Candyman, Brent‑driven When I Paint My Masterpiece, the seamless Maggie’s Farm > Cumberland segue and a powerful Stella Blue, while the first set sits in the middle of the road.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviewers consistently praise the sound quality (clean, punchy) and note several standout songs; the show is described as above‑average with a strong second set, yielding an overall rating around four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clean and punchy GMB soundboard source (gmb_79380); described as the richest version with no noticeable distortion, superior to other mixes.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is average, but the second set lifts the concert with smooth segues (especially Maggie's Farm into Cumberland) and strong performances, giving the show an overall above‑average flow.

band_member_comments.Keys: Brent Mydland shines on When I Paint My Masterpiece and adds new potency to Stella Blue.
band_member_comments.Drums: The drums are highlighted as particularly good for the 1987 era.
